verses.text: David leh Saul a kiho khita kipanin Saul' tapa Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David a it hi
Saul in tua ni-a kipanin ama kiangah David omsak a, a pa' inn-ah ciahsaklo hi
Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David it ahih manin amah tawh thuciamna khat a bawl hi
Jonathan in ama silhlai a puantualpi suahin David pia a, a galkidalna leh a namsau nangawn leh a thal leh a kawnggak zong a pia hi
Saul in a sawlna mun khempeuhah David in a ma tun' hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in galkapte a uk dingin amah a koih hi. Mi khempeuh leh Saul' nasemte in zong hih thu hoih a sa uh hi.

Filistia-pa a thahna panin David ciahin, amaute in inn lam a zuat uh ciangin Israel khuapi khempeuh sung panin kumpi Saul a dawn dingin khuangtung leh lasaknate tawi-in numeite a laam kawmin hong kuankhia uh hi
Amaute gualnuamin numeite khatlekhat in, “Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,” kici uh hi

Saul heh mahmah a, hih thugenna in amah lungkimlo sak hi. Amah in, “Amaute in David tungah a tul sawmin pia-in, kei tungah a tulin hong pia bek uh hi. Kumpi min puak cih simloh bang dang nei nawn ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ni-a kipan Saul in David encik hi
A zing ciangin Pasian' sawl kha gilo in Saul hong bawh a, nisimin David in a hih ngei bangin laia lasakna a tum laitakin ama innsung tengah Saul hang gawp hi. Saul in a khutsungah a teipi tawi hi
Saul in a teipi-in David nih vei a khawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kawm tawh David ka khawhcip ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin David in a nih vei mahin na pelhthei hi
Saul in David kihta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih a, ahih hangin Saul kiang panin amah kihemkhia khinta hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a omna panin David lakhia-in mihing tul khat a ukin koih a, mite a makai-in amah kuankhia-in hong ciah hi
David in a sepna khempeuhah a ma tun' hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih hi
Amah in matutzawhna lianpi a neihlam Saul in a muh ciangin amah lamdang sa-in om hi
Ahih hangin Israel-te khempeuh leh Judah-te khempeuh in David it uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute makaihin amah kuankhia-in hong ciah hi

Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Hih lai-ah ka tanu uzaw Merab om hi. Nang tungah zi dingin kong pia ding hi. Kei-a' dingin hang peuh in la, Topa' gal do in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Saul in, “Keima khutsungah amah siloin Filistia-te' khutsungah si hen,” ci-in ngaihsun hi
David in Saul kiangah, “Kei pen kumpipa' makpa ka hihna dingin kei, bang hi a, Israel-te tungah ka tanaute, ka pa' innkuante bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Ahih hangin David' tungah Saul' tanu Merab a kipiak ding laitakin Meholah mi Adriel tungah a zi dingin kipia hi
Tu-in Saul' tanu Mikhal in David ngai hi. Saul kiangah hih thu a kigen ciangin Saul a lungdam hi

Saul in, “Ama-a' dingin ka tanu pen thangzak ahih theihna ding leh Filistia-te' khutsungah a sihtheihna dingin ama tungah ka tanu pia ning,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in David kiangah a nih veina genin, “Nang pen tu-in ka makpa na hi ding hi,” a ci hi

Saul in a nasemte thu pia a, “David kiangah thu tuam genpih un la, ‘En in, nang tungah kumpipa lungkim a, ama nasemte khempeuh in nang hong it hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kumpipa' makpa suak in,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Saul' nasemte in David kiangah hih thute gen uh hi. David in, “Kei pen mizawng hi-in a zahtakhuailo ka hihna mu napi-in kumpipa' makpa suah ding a thuneu sa na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul' nasemte in ama kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin David in gen hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Saul in, “David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding uh hi: ‘Kumpipa in a galte a thukkik theihna dingin Filistia-te' zangteep za khat cih simloh kumpipa in moman deihlo hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tu-in Saul in Filistia-te' khut tawh David sihsak ding ngaihsun hi
Saul' nasemte in David kiangah hih thute a gen uh ciangin kumpipa' makpa ahih ding David a lungkim hi. A hun a bei ma-in

David dingin ama mite tawh pai a, Filistia mi za nih that hi. Tua ciangin amah kumpipa' makpa a suahtheihna dingin kumpipa tungah a cingin a kipia amaute' zangvun teepte David in hong paipih hi. Saul in a tanu Mikhal ama zi dingin a pia hi
Ahih hangin Topa in David a ompihna leh Israel-te khempeuh in amah a itna thu Saul in a muh ciangin
David a kihta semsem hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul pen David' gal hi tawntung hi

Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante galsim dingin hong kuankhia uh a, amaute hong kuankhiat simin Saul' nasem dangte khempeuh sangin David in a ma tun'zaw hi. Tua ahih manin mite in David thupi muh semsem hi.
